/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libexplore_lite_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o libexplore_lite_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/explore_lite_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/explore_lite_msgs/msg/_explore_status_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/student13/debuging/lei_github/nav_test_for_leo/build/explore_lite_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so libexplore_lite_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libexplore_lite_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
